positive: A detailed, symmetrical illustration of bioluminescent deep-sea flora and fauna. Focus on glowing corals, jellyfish, and mysterious kelp forests. Style: Art Nouveau meets scientific illustration, highly saturated colors, intricate linework, ethereal atmosphere, rendered digitally with photorealistic textures.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, washed out, amateur sketch
